name: Rahul's LPI Agent
description: An AI agent that queries the LPI MCP server to answer questions about the SMILE methodology and digital twins. Returns explainable answers with source citations.
author: Rahul Bijarnia

skills.name: query_smile_methodology
skills.description: Queries the SMILE methodology overview and returns structured explanation

skills.name: search_knowledge_base
skills.description: Searches the LPI knowledge base for specific topics

skills.name: get_case_studies
skills.description: Retrieves real world case studies from the LPI

input.description: A natural language question about SMILE or digital twins

output.description: An explainable answer citing which LPI tools provided which information
